display.purpose: GM-authored content only: note titles, map names, scene names, sidebar wordmark. Never on app-constructed chrome. Weight 400 always — do not bold Metamorphous.

headline.purpose: Major app-constructed headings: modal titles, right rail header, major content section headers.

title.purpose: Tab labels, command palette section groups, popover headings. Also used at 10.5px / uppercase / 0.1em letter-spacing for sidebar section headers.

body.purpose: Editor prose, sidebar note rows, settings descriptions. Cap line length at 65–75ch in long-form reading contexts.

label.purpose: Buttons, input text, tooltips, command palette result items, interactive element text.

meta.purpose: Tags (pill labels), right rail metadata (type, folder, date), inline code, sidebar section header caps. JetBrains Mono only.

motion.name: swift
motion.purpose: Standard state transitions: hover background, color changes, focus rings, icon state changes.

motion.name: instant
motion.purpose: Fastest interactions: command palette result hover, minimal-latency feedback.

motion.name: entrance
motion.purpose: Arrival moments: splash screen fade-in, panel open. Single-instance entrances only — not repeating UI interactions.

breakpoints.name: tablet-portrait
breakpoints.notes: Minimum supported viewport. All features accessible, denser layout, sidebar starts closed.

breakpoints.name: tablet-landscape
breakpoints.notes: Full feature parity. Sidebar and right rail are overlays, mutually exclusive.

breakpoints.name: laptop
breakpoints.notes: Sidebar and right rail dock. Pointer input primary.

breakpoints.name: desktop
breakpoints.notes: Full layout. Sidebar docked open by default.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Creates notes, scenes, maps. Height tracks density via --row-h; 36px shown (balanced).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background-color: #c2483d; color: #f9f1f0; font-family: "Nunito", sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #a83228; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c2483d; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background-color: #8c2420; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions: cancel, toolbar controls, contextual operations. Transparent at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background-color: transparent; color: #a39e99; font-family: "Nunito", sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #f0ece8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c2483d; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Iron Border stroke, focus ring tracks primary accent.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #f0ece8; font-family: "Nunito", sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b6460; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c2483d; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.35; cursor: default; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Inline content labels. JetBrains Mono, pill radius. No color coding — text differentiates.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 22px; padding: 0 10px; background-color: #262626; color: #a39e99; font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 100px; cursor: default; }

components.name: Sidebar Row
components.description: File tree / navigation row. Active state: Crimson Tint background, Crimson icon.
components.html: The Sunken Keep
components.css: .ds-sidebar-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background-color: transparent; color: #a39e99; font-family: "Nunito", sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; user-select: none; } .ds-sidebar-row:hover { background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #f0ece8; } .ds-sidebar-row--active { background-color: rgba(194,72,61,0.12); color: #f0ece8; } .ds-sidebar-row--active .ds-sidebar-row__icon { color: #c2483d; } .ds-sidebar-row__icon { shrink: 0; width: 16px; height: 16px; color: inherit; } .ds-sidebar-row__label { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Command Palette Result
components.description: Search result row inside the command palette. World content names render in Metamorphous.
components.html: The Sunken KeepNotes
components.css: .ds-cmd-result { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background-color: transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms ease-out; } .ds-cmd-result:hover { background-color: rgba(194,72,61,0.12); } .ds-cmd-result__icon { shrink: 0; color: #a39e99; } .ds-cmd-result__name { flex: 1; font-family: "Nunito", sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: #f0ece8; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-cmd-result__meta { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 400; color: #6b6460; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; shrink: 0; }

components.name: Note Title
components.description: World content heading in Metamorphous. The Two Voices Rule in one element — GM-authored names only.
components.css: .ds-note-title { font-family: "Metamorphous", Georgia, serif; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.25; color: #f0ece8; margin: 0; letter-spacing: normal; }

narrative.overview:
Measured, purposeful, quietly beautiful. Maps and notes share a surface. Utility and mystery inhabit the same room. Like a scholar's workroom lit from outside the frame: the tools are excellent and unpretentious, the work laid out on top of them carries all the magic.

Grimoire operates across two registers simultaneously. The application shell is a precision instrument — iron surfaces, sparse chrome, functional Nunito type, restrained 150ms transitions. Then the GM names something: a note, a scene, a map. That name appears in Metamorphous and the world materialises. Chrome stays invisible. World content carries voice.

This system refuses theatricality. No leather textures, chrome bevels, glowing rune borders, ambient fog overlays, or parchment backgrounds. The fantasy is already in the content; the interface needs only to get out of the way.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first. Iron surfaces are the default posture; light mode (Parchment) is a deliberate alt.
Two-voice typography. Nunito for the tool; Metamorphous for the world. Boundary is content ownership.
Single user-switchable accent. Five named presets (Crimson, Arcane, Verdant, Ice, Amber). No secondary palette.
Flat tonal layering. Depth via surface values only; no shadows on structural chrome.
Restrained component geometry. 6px structural / 8px elevated / 100px pill.
Motion is purposeful. 150ms ease-out for state changes; nothing bounces.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: One accent family, one user-controlled preset. No secondary palette. The primary is present on every screen but dominant on none.

rules.name: The No Decorative Color Rule
rules.body: Color never categorizes file types, tag categories, or organizes information visually. Only five semantic families exist. Differentiate with shape, icon, or text.

rules.name: The Sub-AA Exception
rules.body: Ember Faint (42% opacity) is intentionally below AA contrast. Reserved strictly for non-essential decorative labels, section headers, and placeholders. Prohibited for body text, interactive elements, or any content that conveys meaning.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: If the app constructed it, Nunito. If the GM named it, Metamorphous. This boundary holds even for the same piece of text in different contexts.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Type sizes do not change across density settings. Only spacing and component height change. Dense mode is not smaller text — it is less vertical space.

rules.name: The Shadowless Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow or drop-shadow on interface chrome. If a surface needs elevation, use Iron Raised background. If it needs separation, use Iron Border.

dos: Do use Metamorphous exclusively for GM-authored content: note titles, map names, scene names, splash wordmark.
Do use tonal surface steps (Iron Deep / Iron Dark / Iron Raised) to convey depth.
Do pair every error and success state with a status icon (circle-x / circle-check).
Do use Crimson sparingly — active states, primary buttons, links, focus rings.
Do keep component height tied to --row-h for automatic density support.
Do give every icon-only button an aria-label.
Do return focus to the triggering element when overlays and dialogs close.
Do make empty states purposeful: a Metamorphous headline, one Nunito orienting line, one CTA.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to snap all transitions to instant.
donts: Don't use leather textures, chrome bevels, glowing rune borders, or Diablo-style ornamentation.
Don't use parchment backgrounds, ambient fog overlays, or calligraphy fonts as structural UI elements.
Don't apply box-shadow or drop-shadow to interface chrome. The Shadowless Rule is absolute.
Don't introduce a second accent color. The five presets are a single --primary family.
Don't use color to categorize files, tags, or folders. Shape and text only.
Don't use Ember Faint (#6b6460) for body text or interactive labels — it is sub-AA.
Don't bold Metamorphous. Weight 400 only, always.
Don't use a modal dialog for destructive confirmation. Prefer undo toast or inline confirmation.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Transitions use opacity, transform, and color only.
Don't make this look like Obsidian with a TTRPG skin.
